entities.name: BANKURA REGION
entities.description: A region in West Bengal, India, where the diagnostic agronomy study was conducted

entities.name: WEST BENGAL
entities.description: A state in India containing the Bankura region

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC AGRONOMY STUDY
entities.description: A study examining variations in crop yields through socio-ecological analysis of production system components

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, examined for variations in the study

entities.name: SOCIO-ECOLOGICAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis of multiple production system components used to examine crop yields

entities.name: ENVIROTYPING
entities.description: A method employed for root cause analysis to delve into variables affecting rainfed production systems

entities.name: ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A process used to identify the underlying variables affecting the performance of production systems

entities.name: RAINFED PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural production systems that rely on rainfall for water

entities.name: 5MS CONCEPT
entities.description: A framework of five indicators: Mother Earth, man, machine, management, and materials

entities.name: UNDULATING TERRAIN
entities.description: A physical characteristic of the region's land contributing to soil fragility

entities.name: UNPREDICTABLE RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: Irregular precipitation patterns contributing to the fragility of the region

entities.name: DROUGHT SCENARIOS
entities.description: Frequent occurrences of water shortage affecting the region

entities.name: LULC NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used for Land Use Land Cover analysis

entities.name: HIRBANDH
entities.description: A block in the Bankura region analyzed for agricultural area

entities.name: RANIBANDH
entities.description: A block in the Bankura region analyzed for agricultural area

entities.name: ACIDIC SOILS
entities.description: Soils with low pH levels found in the study region

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: The lack of essential macro and micronutrients in the soil

entities.name: PHOSPHOROUS
entities.description: A macro-nutrient found to be deficient in the soil

entities.name: SULFUR
entities.description: A nutrient found to be deficient in the soil

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: A micronutrient found to be deficient in the soil

entities.name: WATER HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of the soil to retain water, found to be poor in the region

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The amount of organic carbon present in the soil

entities.name: BACTERIAL POPULATION
entities.description: The population of bacteria in the soil, found to be low

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: A measure of the number of crops grown on the same land in a year

entities.name: PADDY
entities.description: The primary crop mentioned with low productivity in the region

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of production, measured in kg/ha for paddy

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LANDSCAPE MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Practices designed to ensure higher cropping intensity and system productivity
